guide.whatIs: What Is the Country RNG 2 Guide?
guide.whatIsDescription: The Country RNG 2 guide section explains how the core roll loop works: roll for countries, collect flags, progress through the upgrade tree, and chase rare country events. It covers beginner first steps, luck building, upgrade priority, and advanced tips so you stop wasting rolls and start progressing with a clear plan.
guide.why: Why Read the Country RNG 2 Guide?

whySteps.step1Title: Start With a Clear Roll Loop
whySteps.step1Description: Understand the basic loop of rolling, collecting, comparing rarity, and chasing better flags so your early sessions build toward long-term progress instead of random rolling.
whySteps.step2Description: Learn how luck, the upgrade tree, and roll speed work together to push you toward rare countries and the event moments they trigger.
whySteps.step3Description: Follow upgrade order and boost timing tips so you spend cash, gold, and potions on the systems that actually move your account forward.

countries.whatIs: What Are Countries in Country RNG 2?
countries.whatIsDescription: Countries are the core collectible in Country RNG 2. Each roll produces a country result with its national flag, and rare countries are the main chase target that can trigger special in-game event moments. Your goal is to fill out the collection while pushing for rarer flags through the upgrade tree and luck.

whySteps.step1Description: Rare countries are the highest-value results in the rolling loop, and rolling one can trigger showcase event moments worth recording.
whySteps.step2Description: Tracking the country list helps you see which flags you already own and which rare targets are still missing from your collection.
whySteps.step3Description: Knowing which countries are rare lets you focus your luck, roll speed, and upgrade-tree progress on the results that actually matter.

redeemSteps.heading: How to redeem Country RNG 2 codes

steps.text: Open Country RNG 2 from the official Roblox experience page.
Join a server and open the in-game menu.
Use the redeem or codes panel when a published code is available.
Enter the code exactly as written, then submit it to claim the listed reward.

countryRng2BeginnerGuide.title: Country RNG 2 Beginner Guide
countryRng2BeginnerGuide.subtitle: Learn what to do first, how the country roll loop works, and which upgrade systems matter early.
countryRng2BeginnerGuide.intro: Country RNG 2 is built around rolling for countries, showing off large flags, and progressing through an upgrade tree for better results. New players should focus on the roll loop first, then use upgrades and boosters with a clear goal instead of spending resources randomly.

steps.title: Start with the core roll loop
steps.instruction: Join the official experience and begin rolling countries. Your first goal is to understand the basic loop: roll, collect the country result, compare its value, and keep chasing better flags.
steps.doNotDoFirst: Do not treat the first few rolls as your final build. Early rolls mainly teach the rhythm of the game.

steps.title: Use rarity as your first sorting rule
steps.instruction: Keep an eye on rare country results because rare countries are the main chase target and can create special rolling moments. Better rarity usually matters more than simply filling the collection quickly.
steps.doNotDoFirst: Do not ignore rarity labels when comparing countries.

steps.title: Progress through the upgrade tree
steps.instruction: Use early progress on the upgrade tree because the game directly ties upgrade-tree progress to better flags. Treat the tree as your main long-term path instead of only rolling without improving your account.
steps.doNotDoFirst: Do not spend early resources without checking whether an upgrade improves your rolling or flag progression.

steps.title: Prioritize luck once you are chasing rare countries
steps.instruction: Luck is one of the clearest progression levers for players who want rarer country results. The listed 2X LUCK pass shows that luck is an important stat for the country-chasing loop.
steps.doNotDoFirst: Do not focus only on cosmetics before improving the systems that help you reach better results.

steps.title: Use speed, cash, and gold as support systems
steps.instruction: Faster rolls, cash earnings, and gold earnings support progression by helping you roll more often and build resources faster. The listed passes include FASTER ROLLS, 2X CASH, and 2X GOLD, so these systems are tied to account growth.
steps.doNotDoFirst: Do not buy or activate every support system at once before understanding which bottleneck is slowing your progress.

steps.title: Treat potions as a separate boost layer
steps.instruction: Potion rolls are a separate support layer, shown by the listed 3X POTION ROLL pass. Use potion-related progress when your basic rolling and upgrade-tree path are already clear.
steps.doNotDoFirst: Do not burn boost-style resources before you know what result you are trying to improve.

steps.title: Watch for rare-country events
steps.instruction: The game highlights cool events when rare countries are rolled. These events are a sign that the result is more important than a normal early-game roll.
steps.doNotDoFirst: Do not skip the event feedback after rare rolls; it helps you understand which results are worth keeping or showing off.

countryRng2TierList.title: Country RNG 2 Tier List
countryRng2TierList.subtitle: A practical tier grid for country-roll goals and progression value, sorted by rarity pressure, display value, growth value, and resource impact.
countryRng2TierList.intro: This tier list is organized by what actually affects progress in Country RNG 2: rare country chase value, flag showcase value, upgrade-tree growth, roll speed, and resource gain. Each tier includes the sorting basis so the ranking does not pretend that vibes are science, a rare mercy in gaming lists.

tiers.label: Best chase targets
criteria: Directly tied to rare-country events or better long-term rolling

entries.name: Rare country rolls
entries.basis: Rare countries are the main chase target, and the game highlights special events when rare countries are rolled.

entries.name: Luck-focused progression
entries.basis: Luck directly supports the goal of reaching better country results, and 2X LUCK is a listed progression pass.

tiers.label: High-value progression
criteria: Improves roll volume or resource growth
Useful after the basic roll loop is understood

entries.name: Faster rolls
entries.basis: The FASTER ROLLS pass lists 1.5X faster roll speed, making it valuable for players who want more roll attempts over time.

entries.name: Cash earnings
entries.basis: The 2X CASH pass doubles cash earnings, which supports progression and upgrade-tree activity.

entries.name: Gold earnings
entries.basis: The 2X GOLD pass doubles gold earned, giving it strong value when gold is part of the player's current bottleneck.

tiers.label: Useful support picks
criteria: Good once the player has a clear target
Helpful but not the main country chase

entries.name: Potion roll volume
entries.basis: The 3X POTION ROLL pass increases potion-roll volume, making it useful as a support system rather than the main early-game priority.

entries.name: Starter Pack
entries.basis: The listed Starter Pack is an entry-level bundle, useful for starting progress but less central than rare country rolls, luck, and core upgrade growth.

tiers.label: Basic collection value
criteria: Useful for filling early collection space
Lower display value than rare country results
Mainly supports learning the roll loop

entries.name: Standard country rolls
entries.basis: Normal country rolls are useful for starting the collection, but the game loop clearly pushes players toward rarer countries and better flags.

countryRng2LuckAndUpgradeTree.title: Country RNG 2 Luck and Upgrade Tree
countryRng2LuckAndUpgradeTree.subtitle: Build around free progression first: roll countries, move through the upgrade tree, then add boosts that improve luck, roll volume, cash, gold, or potion output.
countryRng2LuckAndUpgradeTree.intro: Country RNG 2 is built around rolling rare countries, showing off big flags, progressing through the upgrade tree for better flags, and triggering events from rare rolls. The best early route is to improve the core loop before adding optional paid boosts.

cards.label: Beginner priority
cards.effect: Upgrade tree first, then luck, then roll speed, then income and potion output.
cards.whatItChanges: This order improves the main roll-and-upgrade loop before focusing on side boosts.
cards.howToUse: Start with free progress from regular rolling and upgrade-tree progress. Add paid boosts only after the core loop feels worth speeding up.

cards.label: Upgrade Tree
cards.effect: Main progression route for better flags.
cards.whatItChanges: Flag progression and long-term account growth.
cards.howToUse: Use early earnings on the upgrade tree before focusing on short-term boost stacking.

cards.label: Luck
cards.whatItChanges: Rare-country outcomes; the paid 2X Luck pass doubles luck.
cards.howToUse: Prioritize luck when hunting rarer countries or event-triggering rolls.

cards.label: Roll Speed
cards.whatItChanges: More attempts over the same play session; the Faster Rolls pass gives 1.5X faster roll speed.
cards.howToUse: Improve roll speed after basic luck progress, especially for longer sessions.

cards.label: Cash
cards.whatItChanges: Cash income; the 2X Cash pass doubles cash earnings.
cards.howToUse: Focus on cash when upgrade-tree costs are slowing down your next step.

cards.label: Gold
cards.whatItChanges: Gold income; the 2X Gold pass doubles gold earned.
cards.howToUse: Focus on gold when your next useful in-game progress depends on gold.

cards.label: Potion Roll
cards.whatItChanges: Potion-roll volume; the 3X Potion Roll pass rolls 3X as many potions.
cards.howToUse: Treat potion roll as a later boost layer after the basic luck, speed, and upgrade-tree path is moving.

countryRng2GamepassesAndBoosts.title: Country RNG 2 Gamepasses and Boosts
countryRng2GamepassesAndBoosts.subtitle: These passes accelerate specific parts of the loop, but the free path still exists through rolling, earning, and upgrade-tree progress.
countryRng2GamepassesAndBoosts.intro: Country RNG 2 sells direct boost passes for luck, cash, roll speed, gold, potion rolls, and a starter pack. Paid boosts are acceleration tools rather than required purchases.

rows.freePath: Roll normally and progress through the upgrade tree.
rows.bestFor: Players focused on rare countries and rare-roll events.

rows.freePath: Earn cash through normal play and spend carefully on upgrades.
rows.bestFor: Players who want faster upgrade-tree spending.

rows.freePath: Keep rolling and improve core progression first.
rows.bestFor: Long-session players who want more attempts per minute.
rows.valueNote: Raises roll volume, not the odds of each single roll.

rows.freePath: Start normally and learn the loop before spending.
rows.bestFor: First-session players who want the cheapest listed purchase.
Players whose next upgrades depend on gold income.
rows.valueNote: Useful after gold becomes part of the main progress path.

rows.freePath: Use normal potion rolls and core upgrades.
rows.bestFor: Players who actively use potions as part of their rolling plan.
rows.valueNote: Potion-focused boost, not a general beginner requirement.

countryRng2EventsAndRareRolls.subtitle: Rare countries are not just trophies: Country RNG 2 uses rare rolls as event triggers, so the moment after a rare pull matters.

faq.title: Country RNG 2
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about Country RNG 2 codes, countries, rarities, luck, and progression.

questions.question: What is Country RNG 2?
questions.answer: Country RNG 2 is a Roblox flag-rolling RNG game by Retrobyte Gamess where you roll for countries, collect flags, progress through the upgrade tree, and trigger events from rare rolls.

questions.question: Are there working Country RNG 2 codes right now?
questions.answer: Country RNG 2 codes are tracked from the official Roblox page, the Retrobyte Gamess community, and the @RetrobyteG social channel. When a code is published, it appears in the Country RNG 2 Codes section with its listed reward.

questions.question: How do I get rare countries in Country RNG 2?
questions.answer: In Country RNG 2, rare countries come from the rolling loop. Improving luck, progressing the upgrade tree, and increasing roll speed all raise your chances of reaching rare-country rolls and the event moments they trigger.

questions.question: What does the upgrade tree do in Country RNG 2?
questions.answer: The Country RNG 2 upgrade tree is the main long-term progression route, tying your progress to better flags and stronger rolling outcomes instead of relying on random rolls alone.

questions.question: Are Country RNG 2 gamepasses required to progress?
questions.answer: No. Country RNG 2 gamepasses like 2X Luck, 2X Cash, Faster Rolls, 2X Gold, and 3X Potion Roll are acceleration tools. The free path through rolling, earning, and the upgrade tree still works.

questions.question: Where can I play Country RNG 2?
questions.answer: Country RNG 2 is a Roblox experience by Retrobyte Gamess. You can join it from the official Roblox game page and follow the Retrobyte Gamess community for update and code alerts.

cta.title: Ready to Roll in Country RNG 2?
cta.description: Join the Retrobyte Games community on Discord for new codes, rare-country alerts, upgrade-tree tips, and update discussions!
